untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 5-year range percentile calculation and specific calendar date triggers (last day of April, end of July) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. The 'price_pos_20' indicator measures position within a 20-bar range, not a 5-year range. Calendar-based entry/exit logic is not supported by the allowed operators.
translation_notes: The signal is inherently seasonal and calendar-dependent (entry on last day of April, exit at end of July) and requires a custom 5-year high-low range calculation. This goes beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons. price_pos_20 was considered as a substitute for range position but operates on a 20-bar lookback, not 5 years. The 'is' operator does not support calendar date values like 'END_OF_JULY'.
